description: The LoginScreen component is used to handle the dash screen for logging into the game.

fields.Icon: The icon of the dash menu tab.
fields.ActiveColor: The color when this dash menu screen tab is selected.
fields.Label: The text for this dash menu Screen tab.
fields.ScreenEnabled: Whether the screen is enabled for viewing.
fields.BaseResolution: The default resolution of the tab screen.
fields._screenRoot: The root slot of the dash menu tab view.
fields._screenCanvas: The canvas being used for the tab view.
fields._modalOverlayManager: The Overlay manager being used for handling edit mode.
fields._button: The button to select this dash menu screen tab.
fields._iconTexture: The texture being used for the icon of this dash menu tab.
